title: How silence forms a man of faith
caption:
The noise is the problem. Silence is the discipline.

Every man who's been genuinely transformed by faith will tell you the same thing: it happened in the quiet. Not at a conference. Not in a hype room. In a room with a closed door and nothing to check.

"Be still and know that I am God." — Psalm 46:10

You're reading the Word but you're also absorbing 200 notifications a day. Information without silence is just noise. Leave the phone in the other room for ten minutes. Let your mind settle. Pray from that place, not from the noise.

The man who can't sit in silence is uncomfortable in his own company — and that discomfort runs everything. But the man who's found peace in the quiet doesn't need the crowd to feel grounded. And the crowd can tell.

Pick ten minutes this week. Close the door. See what comes up.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #prayer #godlymen #manofgod #silence #thework #christianity
